title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Nykaa Retail

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Nykaa Retail
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Nykaa Retail in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Nykaa Retail:
Nykaa Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
